title: Bright Shades
description: Brighter and cleaner lighting for Minecraft
body:
# 🌈 Bright Shades – Simple, Clean, and Colorful

**Bright Shades** is a small core-shader resourcepack that makes Minecraft look brighter, smoother, and more colorful without changing the original style.  
It’s lightweight, doesn’t need any mods, and keeps the game running fast.

### ✨ What this pack does
- Makes the world feel more alive and vibrant  
- Adds soft, brighter lighting in caves, forests, Nether, etc.  
- Improves visibility without making things look washed out  
- Works with any other texturepack (place Bright Shades on top)  
- Keeps the vanilla look — just cleaner and nicer to explore

### 🎮 Works on
- Minecraft **1.21+**  
- Any vanilla client (no OptiFine needed) also with sodium by using https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-core-shader-support


### 📥 How to use
1. Download the pack  
2. Put it in your `resourcepacks` folder  
3. Turn it on in-game  
4. Enjoy the brighter world!
